Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Generic picker launcher. Opens a card window on the picker layout and pushes the payload to the web viewer. Caller is responsible for building the full payload JSON including callbackScript and callbackContext.

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: PARAMS: (JSON object — passed as-is to receiveFromFileMaker) callbackScript (text, required) — FM script PICKER__Callback will dispatch to callbackContext (object, optional) — merged into callback param alongside stavkePKs groups (array, required) — picker data groupCount (number) stavkeCount (number)

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: ⚠ Update Layout id above after creating the PICKER__PrimkaPicker layout.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Push data to web viewer
